title: 99acres Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: 99acres Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About 99acres Asia Pacific Associates:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres Asia Pacific Associates!
